meta.description: Reference document links for a Detailed Design — one instance per design.

currentStateId.description: UUID of the Current State document.

futureStateId.description: UUID of the Future State document.

confluencePageId.description: UUID of the related Confluence page.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_92ff7fed_b42b_4365_b724_f9cfc6eb9a80" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "current_state_id" UUID,
    "future_state_id" UUID,
    "figma" TEXT,
    "confluence_page_id" UUID,
    "epics" UUID[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "backend_repo_id" UUID,
    "frontend_repo_id" UUID,
    "legacy_screen" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_92ff7fed_b42b_4365_b724_f9cfc6eb9a80" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_92ff7fedb42b4365_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_92ff7fedb42b4365_current_state_id" FOREIGN KEY ("current_state_id") REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_92ff7fedb42b4365_future_state_id" FOREIGN KEY ("future_state_id") REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_92ff7fedb42b4365_confluence_page_id" FOREIGN KEY ("confluence_page_id") REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_92ff7fedb42b4365_backend_repo_id" FOREIGN KEY ("backend_repo_id") REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_92ff7fedb42b4365_frontend_repo_id" FOREIGN KEY ("frontend_repo_id") REFERENCES items(id)
)
